tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsAcceptPage.acceptPage
tools.description: Used to acknowledge an engagement to a contact channel during an incident.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsActivateContactChannel.activateContactChannel
tools.description: Activates a contact's contact channel. Incident Manager can't engage a contact until the contact channel has been activated.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsCreateContact.createContact
tools.description: Contacts are either the contacts that Incident Manager engages during an incident or the escalation plans that Incident Manager uses to engage contacts in phases during an incident.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsCreateContactChannel.createContactChannel
tools.description: A contact channel is the method that Incident Manager uses to engage your contact.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsCreateRotation.createRotation
tools.description: Creates a rotation in an on-call schedule.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsCreateRotationOverride.createRotationOverride
tools.description: Creates an override for a rotation in an on-call schedule.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsDeactivateContactChannel.deactivateContactChannel
tools.description: To no longer receive Incident Manager engagements to a contact channel, you can deactivate the channel.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsDeleteContact.deleteContact
tools.description: To remove a contact from Incident Manager, you can delete the contact. Deleting a contact removes them from all escalation plans and related response plans. Deleting an escalation plan removes it from all related response plans. You will have to recreate the contact and its contact channels before you can use it again.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsDeleteContactChannel.deleteContactChannel
tools.description: To no longer receive engagements on a contact channel, you can delete the channel from a contact. Deleting the contact channel removes it from the contact's engagement plan. If you delete the only contact channel for a contact, you won't be able to engage that contact during an incident.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsDeleteRotation.deleteRotation
tools.description: Deletes a rotation from the system. If a rotation belongs to more than one on-call schedule, this operation deletes it from all of them.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsDeleteRotationOverride.deleteRotationOverride
tools.description: Deletes an existing override for an on-call rotation.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsDescribeEngagement.describeEngagement
tools.description: Incident Manager uses engagements to engage contacts and escalation plans during an incident. Use this command to describe the engagement that occurred during an incident.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsDescribePage.describePage
tools.description: Lists details of the engagement to a contact channel.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsGetContact.getContact
tools.description: Retrieves information about the specified contact or escalation plan.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsGetContactChannel.getContactChannel
tools.description: List details about a specific contact channel.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsGetContactPolicy.getContactPolicy
tools.description: Retrieves the resource policies attached to the specified contact or escalation plan.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsGetRotation.getRotation
tools.description: Retrieves information about an on-call rotation.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsGetRotationOverride.getRotationOverride
tools.description: Retrieves information about an override to an on-call rotation.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsListContactChannels.listContactChannels
tools.description: Lists all contact channels for the specified contact.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsListContacts.listContacts
tools.description: Lists all contacts and escalation plans in Incident Manager.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsListEngagements.listEngagements
tools.description: Lists all engagements that have happened in an incident.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsListPageReceipts.listPageReceipts
tools.description: Lists all of the engagements to contact channels that have been acknowledged.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsListPageResolutions.listPageResolutions
tools.description: Returns the resolution path of an engagement. For example, the escalation plan engaged in an incident might target an on-call schedule that includes several contacts in a rotation, but just one contact on-call when the incident starts. The resolution path indicates the hierarchy of escalation plan > on-call schedule > contact.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsListPagesByContact.listPagesByContact
tools.description: Lists the engagements to a contact's contact channels.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsListPagesByEngagement.listPagesByEngagement
tools.description: Lists the engagements to contact channels that occurred by engaging a contact.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsListPreviewRotationShifts.listPreviewRotationShifts
tools.description:
Returns a list of shifts based on rotation configuration parameters.

The Incident Manager primarily uses this operation to populate the Preview calendar. It is not typically run by end users.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsListRotationOverrides.listRotationOverrides
tools.description: Retrieves a list of overrides currently specified for an on-call rotation.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsListRotations.listRotations
tools.description: Retrieves a list of on-call rotations.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsListRotationShifts.listRotationShifts
tools.description: Returns a list of shifts generated by an existing rotation in the system.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsListTagsForResource.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists the tags of an escalation plan or contact.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsPutContactPolicy.putContactPolicy
tools.description: Adds a resource policy to the specified contact or escalation plan. The resource policy is used to share the contact or escalation plan using Resource Access Manager (RAM). For more information about cross-account sharing, see Setting up cross-account functionality.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsSendActivationCode.sendActivationCode
tools.description: Sends an activation code to a contact channel. The contact can use this code to activate the contact channel in the console or with the ActivateChannel operation. Incident Manager can't engage a contact channel until it has been activated.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsStartEngagement.startEngagement
tools.description: Starts an engagement to a contact or escalation plan. The engagement engages each contact specified in the incident.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsStopEngagement.stopEngagement
tools.description: Stops an engagement before it finishes the final stage of the escalation plan or engagement plan. Further contacts aren't engaged.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsTagResource.tagResource
tools.description: Tags a contact or escalation plan. You can tag only contacts and escalation plans in the first region of your replication set.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsUntagResource.untagResource
tools.description: Removes tags from the specified resource.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsUpdateContact.updateContact
tools.description: Updates the contact or escalation plan specified.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsUpdateContactChannel.updateContactChannel
tools.description: Updates a contact's contact channel.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSsmContactsUpdateRotation.updateRotation
tools.description: Updates the information specified for an on-call rotation.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
